executive_summary: Brain Health 0/0 and Brain Improvement Score 94/100. First 01h handoff JSON package written for the 02h supervisor. Main operational attention remains WACLI hermes not authenticated, which breaks approved LK/Zipper WhatsApp deliveries; no external sends or production writes were performed by the closing job.

material_changes.change: 01h closing package now includes Markdown plus dated handoff JSON and latest-handoff.json for the 02h Daily Intelligence Loop.
Superpowers Operating System PRD, plan, receipts, observe-only integration and local digest were documented on 2026-06-02.
Reaudit concluded Hermes is mature but still has P0/P1 gaps: live docs 23h-to-01h drift, first full 01h cycle validation, skills control plane, WACLI channel health, Kanban/cockpit pilots.

incidents.summary: Approved WhatsApp deliveries fail because wacli account hermes is not authenticated.

LK 19h30 physical store close external delivery

incidents.summary: LK Weekly Collection Sort Rule B keeps a persistent timeout from 2026-05-29.

decisions_made_by_lucas.decision: The 01h close must produce a complete handoff package for the 02h Daily Intelligence Loop, including dated and latest JSON artifacts.
decisions_made_by_lucas.scope: Brain/local/documental reports only; sanitized JSON; no raw transcripts or secrets.
decisions_made_by_lucas.exclusions: No Docker, VPS, gateway, external systems, secrets, WhatsApp/email/customer sends or production writes.

decisions_made_by_lucas.decision: Brain Health Check and Brain Improvement Score item 2 are part of the existing daily close gate, not a separate cron.
decisions_made_by_lucas.scope: Local/read-only health and score scripts plus reports inside the Brain repository.
decisions_made_by_lucas.exclusions: No new cron and no production/runtime/external mutation.

approvals_and_corrections.pattern: Generate 01h handoff JSON artifacts every run.
approvals_and_corrections.exact_scope: Write reports/daily-consolidation/YYYY-MM-DD-handoff.json and reports/daily-consolidation/latest-handoff.json after the Markdown daily consolidation.
approvals_and_corrections.exclusions: Do not include raw chat transcripts, secrets, unverified live data, HTML dumps or customer-sensitive payloads.

approvals_and_corrections.pattern: Generated reports are not delivered reports.
approvals_and_corrections.exact_scope: Delivery routines must separate generated, email sent, WhatsApp sent and failure states.
approvals_and_corrections.exclusions: Do not mark WhatsApp delivery as successful when wacli fails.

approvals_and_corrections.pattern: Cron with deliver=origin should not have prompt/delivery changed automatically.
approvals_and_corrections.exact_scope: Document the recommended Superpowers/02h15 section for the 02h30 report, but wait for scoped approval before editing the origin-delivered job.
approvals_and_corrections.exclusions: No Telegram prompt/delivery mutation in this job.
